label: Educational explainer
acceptance_criteria: Hook captures attention in first 5 seconds
Core concept explained in plain language
At least one concrete example or analogy

scenes.narration: Have you ever wondered about {subject}? In the next few minutes, you will understand what it is, why it matters, and how it applies to you.
Let us start with context. {subject} affects how we work, learn, and solve problems every day — often in ways we do not notice.
At its core, {subject} is about one simple idea. Break it down: what is the problem, what is the mechanism, and what changes when you apply it?

visual.prompt: Clean infographic diagram explaining {subject}, minimal flat design, 16:9

scenes.narration: Here is a real-world example. Imagine a typical scenario where {subject} makes a measurable difference.
Common misconceptions? Let us clear them up. What people often get wrong — and what is actually true.
To recap: {subject} is powerful because it connects ideas to action. Remember the core takeaway and apply it where it fits.
